function.name: current_datetime
function.description: Gets the current date and time.

function.name: web_search
function.description: Search the internet for up-to-date information.

function.name: scrape_url
function.description: Fast extraction of static text from a URL. Use this for quickly reading articles or wikis. DO NOT use this for interactive tasks, logins, or dynamic JS-heavy apps.

function.name: vault_change_directory
function.description: Change the current directory (enter or exit a folder). Use '..' as the path to exit to the parent directory. Note you are ALREADY in /vault/ by default (e.g you should access vault.md with 'vault', not '/vault/vault'), unless you have changed it (use vault_get_working_directory tool to check if needed.)

path.description: The folder name to enter, or '..' to go back up.

function.name: vault_get_working_directory
function.description: Returns the current path you are in relative to /vault/. Use this if you are lost or need to confirm your current folder location.

function.name: vault_create_directory
function.description: Create a new subdirectory inside your current location.

dirname.description: The name of the new folder.

function.name: vault_list_files
function.description: List all files and folders in a directory. Crucial for seeing where you are.

subpath.description: Optional subdirectory to look into. Defaults to '.' (your current directory).

function.name: vault_read_file
function.description: Read the text content of a specific file.

filename.description: The name of the file to read (e.g., '_folder_info.txt').

function.name: vault_write_file
function.description: OVERWRITES a file with new content. Use this for creating new files, editing existing ones, or reformatting a note entirely.

filename.description: The name of the file to save to (must end in .md).

content.description: The text content to save inside the file.

function.name: vault_remove_file
function.description: Permanently deletes a file. This will trigger a manual confirmation prompt for the user.

filename.description: The name or relative path of the file to delete.

function.name: vault_remove_directory
function.description: Permanently deletes an entire folder and everything inside it. This will trigger a manual confirmation prompt for the user.

dirname.description: The name of the folder to delete.

function.name: vault_append_file
function.description: EXTENDS a file by adding text to the bottom. Use this for logs, journals, or adding a quick note to the end of a list without needing to read the whole file first.

content.description: The text to add to the bottom.

function.name: vault_move_item
function.description: Move or rename a file or folder. Use this to organize the vault or archive old notes.

function.name: browser_wait
function.description: Waits for a specified number of seconds. Use this when a webpage is actively loading, a progress bar is running, a game is starting up, or you are waiting for a transition animation to finish.

function.name: browser_navigate
function.description: Opens a URL in the browser.

function.name: browser_get_view
function.description: Reads the current browser page. Returns a visual SCREENSHOT of the page alongside a text list of interactive elements with IDs. ALWAYS run this before clicking or typing.

function.name: browser_click
function.description: PRIMARY CLICK METHOD. Clicks an element in the browser by its numerical ID badge. You MUST run browser_get_view first to find the ID. ALWAYS use this instead of hover/grid clicking if the target has an ID, as it is much faster and more reliable. NOTE: Clicking on an element using this tool does NOT affect the hovered position set by browser_hover_grid.

element_id.description: The ID number of the element to click.

function.name: browser_type
function.description: Types text directly on the keyboard. NOTE: This does NOT target a specific element. You MUST use browser_click on the input field first to focus it, and THEN use this tool to type. Can optionally press Enter after typing.

press_enter.description: Set to true to press Enter after typing (crucial for search bars).

function.name: browser_scroll
function.description: Scrolls the page up or down. NOTE: If you are in a web app with multiple panels (like an email client) and scrolling does nothing, it means the wrong panel is focused. You MUST use browser_click on a text element inside the pane you want to read FIRST to focus it, then try scrolling again.

amount.description: Pixels to scroll. Default is 400. Use smaller values (100-200) for careful scrolling.

function.name: browser_hover_grid
function.description: FALLBACK METHOD. Places a virtual cursor at the center of a specific grid cell on the screen. Format must be Row (A-P) and Column (1-26). ONLY use this if the button/element you want to interact with DOES NOT have a numerical ID badge. Run this to visually confirm alignment using browser_get_view, then you can follow up with browser_click_hovered. NOTE: You CANNOT click immediately after this. You MUST run browser_get_view right after hovering to visually confirm you are aiming correctly.

grid_id.description: The grid coordinate to hover, e.g., 'A1', 'C15', 'P26'.

function.name: browser_click_hovered
function.description: Clicks the exact location of your currently placed virtual cursor. STRICT RULE: You are FORBIDDEN from calling this immediately after browser_hover_grid. You MUST call browser_get_view in between to visually confirm the cursor's location, otherwise the system will block the click and return an error.

function.name: browser_press_key
function.description: Presses a specific key on the keyboard instantly. Useful for navigating games (w, a, s, d), pressing 'Escape' to close popups, or 'Enter' to submit forms.

function.name: browser_list_tabs
function.description: Lists all currently open browser tabs with their Tab IDs.

function.name: browser_open_tab
function.description: Opens a new browser tab. Optionally navigates to a URL.

url.description: Optional URL to navigate to after opening the tab.

function.name: browser_close_tab
function.description: Closes a specific browser tab by its Tab ID. Use browser_list_tabs to find the ID.

tab_id.description: The ID of the tab to close.

function.name: browser_switch_tab
function.description: Switches focus to a specific browser tab by its Tab ID. Use browser_list_tabs to find the ID.

tab_id.description: The ID of the tab to switch to.
